title: Shoti - LDR
text: I don't love I don't if love isn't from you I don't want her I don't if she is in you you're always on my mind that's how much I care I can't think of a time that you were in there I know that I'd be lying if I didn't want you here cuz baby I'm in love you why can't you just live me [Music] [Music] why do you live so far why do you live so far [Music] I know what happens to them they always fall apart but now you've change my mind cuz you're the girl I want in in I want you to have my heart you're my and I am yours I don't love I if love isn't from you isn't I don't want if she is in [Music] you you're always on my mind that's how much I care I can't think of a Time that you were't there I know that I'd be lying if I didn't want you here cuz baby I'm in love you why can't you just live me you're always on my mind that's how much I can I can't think of a time that you were in there I know that I'd be lying if I didn't want you here cuz baby I'm in love you why can't you just live me but now you've changed my mind cuz you're the girl I want in life I want you to have my heart you're mind and I am yours
